top_signals.title: Nuclear verdict alert: almost $50M against a mystery Texas trucking company
top_signals.summary:
A $50 million nuclear verdict was handed down against a Texas trucking company that may not be in business.

top_signals.title: OKX’s X Layer launches Exchange OS, allowing users to create custom crypto markets
top_signals.summary: Exchange OS moves core exchange functions, such as matching, margining, liquidation, and settlement, to the protocol layer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
